changeSet.author: bdsec
changeSet.comment: Create odoo_billing_payment_status table — payment gate between Odoo billing and Bahmni clinical services
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE odoo_billing_payment_status ( id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, patient_id INT NOT NULL, visit_id INT NOT NULL, encounter_id INT NULL, service_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, service_reference_id VARCHAR(255) NULL, odoo_invoice_id VARCHAR(255) NULL, payment_status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', amount_due DECIMAL(10,2) NULL, amount_paid DECIMAL(10,2) NULL, currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'KES', payment_date DATETIME NULL, odoo_sync_timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(), voided TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, voided_by INT NULL, void_reason VARCHAR(255) NULL, uuid CHAR(38) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY uq_obps_uuid (uuid), CONSTRAINT fk_obps_patient FOREIGN KEY (patient_id) REFERENCES patient(patient_id), CONSTRAINT fk_obps_visit FOREIGN KEY (visit_id) REFERENCES visit(visit_id), CONSTRAINT fk_obps_encounter FOREIGN KEY (encounter_id) REFERENCES encounter(encounter_id), CONSTRAINT fk_obps_voided_by FOREIGN KEY (voided_by) REFERENCES users(user_id) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

changeSet.author: bdsec
changeSet.comment: Switch odoo_billing_payment_status.patient_id from the internal numeric patient PK to the Bahmni patient identifier string (e.g. BDSEC200001), so it matches what every other part of the system (Odoo payloads, ConsultationFeeOdooService, the Bahmni UI) calls "patient_id". Backfills existing rows from each patient's preferred identifier. A FK back to patient(patient_id) is no longer possible once the column is a string — this is an accepted tradeoff; referential integrity for patient_id is now enforced in application code (BillingOrderService resolves and validates it via patient_uuid).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE odoo_billing_payment_status ADD COLUMN patient_identifier_tmp VARCHAR(50) NULL;
ALTER TABLE odoo_billing_payment_status DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_obps_patient;
ALTER TABLE odoo_billing_payment_status DROP COLUMN patient_id;
ALTER TABLE odoo_billing_payment_status CHANGE patient_identifier_tmp patient_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX idx_obps_pvs ON odoo_billing_payment_status (patient_id, visit_id, service_type);

changeSet.author: bdsec
changeSet.comment: Add bed_id/bed_number so the BED service_type rows (bed reservation quotations) can be looked up per physical bed — reuses this table rather than adding a dedicated reservation table. Both columns stay NULL for every non-BED service_type row.

changeSet.author: bdsec
changeSet.comment: Add ward_uuid/room_name (only meaningful for BED service_type rows) so the ward-level and room-level reservation indicators can be computed without a separate table or a cross-module join into bedmanagement's own location tables.
